title: The Story of Growth Journey

blocks.heading: The Story of Growth Journey
blocks.body: This is the story of Growth Journey Therapy – a story of hope, healing, and the unyielding belief that everyone deserves access to compassionate, culturally aware mental health care.

blocks.heading: A Beacon of Culturally Aware Healing
blocks.body: In the heart of Pennsylvania, there stands a testament to resilience, understanding, and the power of culturally aware healing – Growth Journey Therapy. The story of this transformative space begins with its founder, Nelsery De Leon, a BIPOC LatinX immigrant whose own journey inspired a mission to provide comprehensive, bilingual therapy that resonates with the diverse tapestry of Pennsylvania’s people.

blocks.heading: The professional, licensed, and vetted therapist who you can trust you can rest assured that all of our staff are credentialed and meet the highest standards for informed and expert care.

excerpt: Meet the bilingual, culturally-affirming team of therapists and staff behind Growth Journey Therapy.
seoDescription: Meet the Growth Journey Therapy team: bilingual, culturally-aware clinicians and staff serving immigrant and BIPOC communities across Pennsylvania and Philadelphia.
